title: StoreConfig
description: Configuration settings for a store view.

code.description: Unique string code identifier for the store view.

website_id.description: ID of the website this store view belongs to.

locale.description: Locale code for this store (e.g. en_US, fr_FR).

base_currency_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

default_display_currency_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the display currency.

weight_unit.description: Weight unit used for this store (lbs or kgs).

base_url.description: Base URL of the store frontend.

base_link_url.description: Base link URL for the store.

base_media_url.description: Base URL for media assets in this store.

secure_base_url.description: Secure (HTTPS) base URL of the store frontend.
